# Copilot Instructions

This is a Next.js 15 project for Concepta Innovation Systems, a Microsoft Azure AI Partner specializing in cybersecurity and technology solutions.

## Project Structure
- Modern Next.js (App Router) application
- TypeScript for type safety
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- Framer Motion for animations
- Lucide React for icons

## Design Guidelines
- Primary color: Deep blue (#0B4BBB) for headers, footers, and CTAs
- Secondary: White background for main content
- Accent: Light gray for section backgrounds
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Clean, accessible HTML structure

## Key Features
- Sticky header with scroll-based background transition
- Smooth scroll animations using Framer Motion
- Responsive navigation with mobile menu
- Professional corporate styling
- Contact forms and newsletter signup
- News/blog section

## Components
- Header with logo, navigation, search, and contact info
- Hero section with compelling messaging
- Solutions showcase
- Professional services grid
- News & events section
- Footer with contact information

When making changes, maintain the professional, modern aesthetic and ensure all interactions are smooth and accessible.
